1.body:
This handbook is a collection of learning references to support undergraduate studies, mainly in the domains of science & applied sciences. The learning references decompose into 4 types: textbooks. study guides / answer books. coloring books. flash cards. All learning references are broken down into domains (as Markdown Header 1) and sub-domains (as Markdown Header 2). The canonical form of a learning reference is: A title, A list of authors, A list of ISBN-13. The regular expression of a learning reference is: //(list sequence as integer). (title as string) - (list of authors as string separated by comma). (list of ISBN-13 codes as numbers enclosed in parenthesis separated by space).
\d+\.\s[a-zA-Z]+\s-\s[a-zA-Z\s\.\,]+(\(978\-\d{10}\)\s)+
